name: document_id_present
expression: document_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(document_id)) > 0
description: Every extracted record must carry a document_id — system invariant required for lineage tracking, audit trail, and deduplication

name: avg_confidence_acceptable
description: Overall extraction confidence below 0.68 indicates the document may be a scan of low quality, partially missing, or in an unsupported format; route to quarantine for human review

name: effective_date_not_null
description: Effective date is required to anchor the project timeline, trigger billing schedules, and manage SLA obligations; records without it are not actionable

name: total_contract_value_positive
description: Contract value must be positive when present; zero or negative values indicate an extraction error or corrupt financial data

name: deliverables_present
expression: deliverables IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(deliverables) > 0
description: A SOW should define at least one deliverable; absence may indicate extraction failure or an incomplete document requiring human review

name: payment_terms_present
expression: payment_terms IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(payment_terms)) > 0
description: Payment terms are required for accounts payable / receivable processing; absence blocks invoice automation

name: end_date_after_effective_date
expression: end_date IS NULL OR effective_date IS NULL OR end_date > effective_date
description: End date must be after effective date if both are present; inversion indicates a date extraction or data entry error
